title: Hardcore Support
description: adds Warnings for low hunger, and also if you aren't wearing a totem
body:
No longer will you have to die, simply because you forgot to re-aquip a totem after repairing a tool, with this mod, a notification will play when a totem is not found in the offhand.

Hunger has been added to the mod aswell, a notification will also pop-up if you drop below a set limit.
